'''katate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ascendingly|ascendingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ascendingly|ascendingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| katate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:katate|katate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:katatesher|katatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katatesherĂ«m|katatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:katatero|katatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:katateshĂ«|katateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katateshĂ«m|katateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikatatero|gokikatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikatateshĂ«|gokikatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikatateshĂ«m|gokikatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokatankerom|gokatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokatankeshĂ«|gokatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokatankeshĂ«m|gokatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokatankeya|gokatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kataterom|kataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katatemu|katatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:katateya|katateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikataterom|gokikataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikatatemu|gokikatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikatateya|gokikatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:katatate|katatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:katatatesher|katatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katatatesherĂ«m|katatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:katatatero|katatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:katatateshĂ«|katatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katatateshĂ«m|katatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikatatatero|gokikatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikatatateshĂ«|gokikatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikatatateshĂ«m|gokikatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokatatankerom|gokatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokatatankeshĂ«|gokatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokatatankeshĂ«m|gokatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokatatankeya|gokatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:katataterom|katataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:katatatemu|katatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:katatateya|katatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikatataterom|gokikatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikatatatemu|gokikatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikatatateya|gokikatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠte|kĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠtesher|kĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠtero|kĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠtero|gokikĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠterom|kĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠtemu|kĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠtĂŠteya|kĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠterom|gokikĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠtĂŠteya|gokikĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kaftafte|kaftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kaftaftesher|kaftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kaftaftesherĂ«m|kaftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kaftaftero|kaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kaftafteshĂ«|kaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kaftafteshĂ«m|kaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikaftaftero|gokikaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikaftafteshĂ«|gokikaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikaftafteshĂ«m|gokikaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokaftafnkerom|gokaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokaftafnkeshĂ«|gokaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokaftafnkeshĂ«m|gokaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokaftafnkeya|gokaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kaftafterom|kaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kaftaftemu|kaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kaftafteya|kaftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikaftafterom|gokikaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikaftaftemu|gokikaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikaftafteya|gokikaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
